articles.title: Viral student robber nabbed in Mambaling after armed person report
articles.description: CEBU CITY, Philippines — A 44-year-old man linked to a robbery targeting students along C. Padilla Street was arrested Saturday evening, April 25, after police responded to a report of an armed individual in Barangay Mambaling, Cebu City. The case drew attention on social media after posts about the incident circulated online and went viral, showing the victims injured following the robbery and prompting public concern and calls for action. Robbery link uncovered after armed arrest Police identified the suspect as Jovanny Pebida Pahugot, a resident of Sitio Kahuyan, who was apprehended at around 9:40 p.m. The arrest stemmed from [...]...
